# cpp-mcp Upstream Snapshot

- Upstream repository: https://github.com/hkr04/cpp-mcp

This directory is a vendored snapshot. MothProbe application code should depend on
`src/mothon/*` wrapper interfaces instead of including upstream headers directly.
